subtitle: AI Safety Docs & Invoicing
tagline: The all-in-one business app built for Kiwi tradies

descriptions.short: AI safety docs, invoicing & business tools for NZ tradies
descriptions.full:
BossBoard is the all-in-one business app built specifically for New Zealand tradespeople. Whether you're a sparky, plumber, builder, landscaper, or any other trade professional, BossBoard puts everything you need to run your business right in your pocket.

FREE BETA - All features are completely free while we're in beta. No credit card required. No catches.

SAFETY COMPLIANCE MADE SIMPLE
Generate professional Safe Work Method Statements (SWMS) in seconds using AI. Our system understands NZ health and safety requirements under the Health and Safety at Work Act 2015 and produces WorkSafe-compliant documentation tailored to your specific trade and job. No more wrestling with Word templates or copying from outdated documents.

- AI-powered SWMS generation with hazard identification
- Pre-built templates for electricians, plumbers, builders, and more
- Automatic control measures aligned to the hierarchy of controls
- PDF export for site submission and audits
- Track your certifications and licences with expiry reminders

PROFESSIONAL INVOICING & QUOTING
Create and send professional invoices and quotes with proper GST calculations. Track payments, chase outstanding invoices, and keep your cashflow healthy.

- Create GST-inclusive or exclusive invoices in minutes
- Generate professional PDF invoices with your business branding
- Email invoices directly to customers with one tap
- Share invoices via a secure client portal link
- Build quotes and convert them to invoices with a single tap
- Track draft, sent, and paid statuses at a glance

EXPENSE TRACKING
Snap a photo of your receipt and log your expenses on the spot. Categorise by materials, tools, fuel, subcontractors, and more. Come tax time, you'll have everything sorted and ready for your accountant.

- Seven expense categories designed for trades
- Receipt photo capture from camera or gallery
- Running totals and category breakdowns
- Export-ready records for your accountant or IRD

JOB SITE LOGGING
Clock in when you arrive on site, clock out when you leave. Track your hours, add notes, and keep a complete record of every job. Perfect for quoting future work accurately and tracking labour costs.

- One-tap clock in and clock out
- Live timer while you're on the job
- Site address recording
- Notes and job descriptions
- Historical job log for every site

TEAM MANAGEMENT
Growing your team? Invite your workers, assign roles, and manage permissions. Everyone stays on the same page without the admin headache.

- Invite team members via email
- Role-based access (Owner, Admin, Worker)
- Team-wide visibility of jobs and compliance docs
- Accept or decline invites from your phone

CERTIFICATION TRACKING
Never get caught with an expired licence again. BossBoard tracks all your trade certifications and sends push notification reminders at 30, 14, 7, and 1 day before expiry.

- Track electrical, plumbing, gasfitting, and all trade licences
- Automatic push notification reminders
- Dashboard overview of upcoming expiries
- Peace of mind for site access and audits

BUSINESS DASHBOARD & INSIGHTS
See how your business is performing at a glance. Revenue trends, outstanding invoice aging, top customers, and monthly comparisons - all on your home screen.

- Revenue comparison (this month vs last month)
- Outstanding invoice aging (0-30, 31-60, 61-90, 90+ days)
- Top customers by revenue
- Monthly revenue chart
- Quick action shortcuts

BUILT FOR NEW ZEALAND
BossBoard is designed from the ground up for the Kiwi trades industry. NZ-specific compliance templates, GST calculations, and WorkSafe alignment mean you're always operating within local requirements.

- Health and Safety at Work Act 2015 aligned
- WorkSafe NZ compliant documentation
- GST calculations (15%)
- NZ trade licence types
- NZ English throughout

COMING SOON
- Xero integration for automatic accounting sync
- Stripe payment collection on invoices
- Digital signature capture on SWMS documents
- Visa and immigration compliance tracking
- Recurring invoice automation

FREE BETA
We're currently in beta and all features are completely free for all users. Help us build the best tradie app in New Zealand by giving us your feedback.

Questions or feedback? Get in touch at support@instilligent.nz

Built by Instilligent Limited, New Zealand.

reviewAccount.note: Create a dedicated demo account for app reviewers
reviewAccount.instructions: BossBoard is a business management app for NZ tradespeople. The app requires an account. A demo account has been provided. Camera and photo library access is used for receipt and site photo capture.
